---
title: "Skills"
---

# Skills & Certifications

My skill set combines business analysis, marketing strategy, data interpretation, and creative communication.

---

## Technical Skills

::: {.skill-section}

### Data Analysis & Business Analytics

- Excel
- SQL
- Python
- Survey data analysis
- Data cleaning
- Data visualization
- Business reporting

### Marketing & Communication

- Social media marketing
- Content strategy
- SEO
- Campaign planning
- Consumer insights
- Competitive analysis
- Branding and storytelling

### Tools

- Microsoft Excel
- PowerPoint
- Canva
- SQL platforms
- Python
- CursorAI
- HTML & CSS

:::

---

## Professional Strengths

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### Detail-Oriented Analysis

I pay close attention to data accuracy, structure, and presentation quality.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Creative Problem Solving

I enjoy connecting business challenges with practical and creative solutions.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Clear Communication

I can translate complex information into simple, organized, and visually clear messages.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Adaptability

My international academic and professional experience helps me adjust quickly to new environments.
:::
:::

---


## Certifications

These certifications reflect my continuous learning in **AI**, **cloud computing**, **programming**, **data analytics**, and **professional development**.

---

### AI & Generative AI

::: {.cert-visual-grid}

::: {.cert-visual-card}
[![](<certificates/certificates/AWS Academy Graduate - Generative AI Foundations.png>){fig-alt="AWS Academy Graduate - Generative AI Foundations Certificate"}](<certificates/certificates/AWS Academy Graduate - Generative AI Foundations.png>)

### AWS Academy Graduate - Generative AI Foundations

**AWS Academy**

Completed foundational training in generative AI concepts, applications, and responsible AI practices.
:::

::: {.cert-visual-card}
[![](<certificates/certificates/Building RAG Agents with LLMs.png>){fig-alt="Building RAG Agents with LLMs Certificate"}](<certificates/certificates/Building RAG Agents with LLMs.png>)

### Building RAG Agents with LLMs

**NVIDIA**

Explored retrieval-augmented generation concepts and LLM-based agent workflows.
:::

::: {.cert-visual-card}
[![](<certificates/certificates/Efficient Large Language Model (LLM) Customization.png>){fig-alt="Efficient Large Language Model Customization Certificate"}](<certificates/certificates/Efficient Large Language Model (LLM) Customization.png>)

### Efficient Large Language Model Customization

**NVIDIA**

Learned concepts related to efficient customization and adaptation of large language models for specific use cases.
:::

::: {.cert-visual-card}
[![](<certificates/certificates/Generative AI with Diffusion Models.png>){fig-alt="Generative AI with Diffusion Models Certificate"}

---

## Languages

::: {.info-grid}
::: {.info-card}
### Mandarin Chinese

Native
:::

::: {.info-card}
### English

Proficient  
Duolingo English Test: 120
:::
:::

---

## Career-Relevant Skill Summary

| Area | Skills |
|---|---|
| Data Analysis | Excel, SQL, Python, survey analysis, data visualization |
| Marketing | SEO, social media strategy, content planning, campaign analysis |
| Business | Market research, competitive analysis, project planning |
| Communication | Presentation, reporting, storytelling, cross-cultural collaboration |
| Technology | Generative AI, CursorAI, HTML, CSS |
